chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1248 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «أَطْرِفُوا أَهْلِيكُمْ كُلَّ يَوْمِ جُمُعَةٍ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ اَلْفَاكِهَةِ وَ اَللَّحْمِ حَتَّى يَفْرَحُوا بِالْجُمُعَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1248 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Make your families happy every Jumu’ah by providing them with something of fruit and meat so that they may rejoice in the day of Jumu’ah."
